error.title: Admin Error
error.fallback: An unexpected error occurred in the admin console.

dashboard.title: Admin Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Platform overview and the items waiting on the admin team.

priority.title: Priority Actions
priority.subtitle: Items waiting on the admin team.
priority.disputedTitle: {count, plural, one {# disputed order} other {# disputed orders}}
priority.disputedSub: Open mediation: review timeline + force-transition if needed.
priority.paymentsTitle: {count, plural, one {# payment awaiting review} other {# payments awaiting review}}
priority.paymentsSub: Verifying a proof automatically advances the order to paid.
priority.usersTitle: {count, plural, one {# user needs review} other {# users need review}}
priority.usersSub: KYC documents, pending accounts, or incomplete profiles.

caughtUp.title: All caught up
caughtUp.body: No disputed orders and no pending payments to review. Use the sidebar to manage <usersLink>users</usersLink>, <categoriesLink>categories</categoriesLink>, or <newsLink>news</newsLink>.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Manage user roles and account status.

filters.noResults: No users match the current filters.

kyc.pendingBanner: {count, plural, one {# document awaiting review} other {# documents awaiting review}}
kyc.pendingHint: Approve to grant Level 2 (identity verified). Phone verification is not required first.
kyc.levelHint: Level 3 is for trusted sellers (e.g. listing gate). Document approval sets level 2; phone OTP sets level 1. All changes are logged in audit_logs.
kyc.docsApproved: Documents approved. User is now level {level}.
kyc.docsPending: {count, plural, one {# doc pending} other {# docs pending}}

categories.title: Product Categories
categories.subtitle: Manage product categories and their specification defaults. Custom Grade categories let sellers fill in mesh and exact values per listing.
categories.listingsCountTitle: {count, plural, one {# listing references this category} other {# listings reference this category}}

form.customGradeHint: Seller fills in mesh size and exact values per listing.
form.meshHint: e.g. +100 means ≥80% of particles retained on a 100-mesh screen. -100 means ≥80% pass through it.
form.sizeDistributionHint: Default 80 — i.e. 80% MIN on the mesh.

orders.title: All Orders
orders.subtitle: Monitor all orders across the platform.

forceTransition.title: Admin: Force Transition
forceTransition.hint: Bypasses the state machine. All actions are recorded in audit_logs. Use only for dispute resolution or recovery.
forceTransition.reasonPlaceholder: Why is this manual transition needed?
forceTransition.reasonRequired: Reason is required for force transitions.
forceTransition.sameStatus: Target status is the same as current.

payments.title: Payment Oversight
payments.subtitle: Sellers are the primary reviewers for payments on their own orders. This page lets admins audit and (if needed) override the decision — e.g. to mediate disputes or unstick a payment when a seller is unresponsive.

news.title: News Articles
news.subtitleDesktop: Aggregate, review and publish graphite industry news. Use the Fetch latest news button to pull fresh candidates from the LLM (no DB writes until you confirm).
news.subtitleMobile: Review, fetch, and publish industry news.

reject.title: Reject article
reject.hint: The article will be hidden from the public site but kept in the database so the same source URL / title is auto-skipped on future fetches.
reject.reasonPlaceholder: Reason (optional, e.g. off-topic, low quality, duplicate event)

translate.title: Translate article
translate.hint: Triggers one Poe call per language. Existing translations are overwritten when you click again.

settings.title: Platform Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure platform-wide notification and integration options.

email.title: Email (SMTP)
email.hint: Configure SMTP_HOST / SMTP_USER / SMTP_PASS / EMAIL_FROM_ADDRESS in .env.local. AWS SES domain must be verified before sending to non-verified recipients (production access required).

kycGates.title: KYC gates
kycGates.intro: Minimum profiles.kyc_level required for each action. Set both to 0 during tuning so all active users can trade; raise to 1+ when you want documents on file.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.smsHint: When enabled, transactional SMS are sent alongside email for users with a phone number on their profile. Requires SMS gateway environment variables.
notifications.gatewayNotConfigured: Gateway not configured: set SMS_BASE_URL and SMS_APP_ID in your deployment environment.

minePhotos.title: Mining Site Photos
minePhotos.subtitle: Manage photo categories and galleries shown on the public mining photos page.
minePhotos.deleteCategoryConfirm: Delete this category and all its photos? This cannot be undone.
